headline: Tuesday's session: most active stock in the S&P500 index
summary: Explore the S&P500 index on Tuesday and find out which stocks are the most active in today's session. Stay updated with the stocks that are capturing market interest and driving market movements.

headline: GIP and EQT-led consortium agree to acquire AES for $33.4bn
summary: The transaction will see AES delisted from the NYSE and continue to operate regulated utilities in Indiana and Ohio, US.

raw.headline: GIP and EQT-led consortium agree to acquire AES for $33.4bn

headline: The AES Corporation (AES) Loses 17.8% on Discounted Merger With GIP, EQT
summary: We recently published 10 Firms Facing a Rough March So Far. The AES Corporation (NYSE:AES) was one of the worst performers on Monday. The AES Corp. fell by 17.77 percent on Monday to close at $14.21 apiece, as investors unloaded portfolios following news that it would be acquired by a consortium led by Global Infrastructure […]
